tagline: Durable memory and live schema context for business-native agents.
description: GrayMatter gives agents durable memory, shared graph context, and authenticated awareness of the live ValkyrAI api-0 schema.
dashboardPrerequisites: Complete individual or business identity verification for the publishing name.
Use a global data residency OpenAI project.
Grant api.apps.write and api.apps.read to the submitter.
Deploy the MCP server to a public HTTPS domain.
Provide reviewer test credentials through the OpenAI Platform Dashboard only.
reviewPromptSet: Use GrayMatter to show what tools are available.
Write a MemoryEntry noting that the review demo account is working.
Search GrayMatter for the review demo memory.
Summarize the ValkyrAI schema with GrayMatter.
List safe sample Task entities from GrayMatter.
